approvalSource: Steve approved unattended Foundation-only continuation; EXTRACT-CURRENT-001 proves current-day freshness before backfill/source expansion.
scopeSummary: Prove governed Gmail, Missive, meeting notes, Google Calendar, and Slack current-day lanes are fresh; latest jobs succeeded; partial failures are visible and retry-classified; eligible current failures are repaired through existing governed recovery; no broad historical extraction or unsafe external writes.
constraints: Foundation-only; do not start Value Builder split.
Use existing live sprint unless proof closeout explicitly updates Current Sprint truth.
Do not run broad historical extraction from this card.
Do not send messages or perform external writes.
Do not mutate Google Drive permissions.
Do not mutate credentials, provider config, or keys.
No new source access, paid/provider access, or browser-auth work.
Existing governed Foundation repair reruns are allowed only for health/proof/repeated-failure recovery when they read approved source data and write local archive/ledger/proof rows only.
Approval-bound actions park the action, not the whole sprint; continue safe approved sprint work.
Each card must close with focused proof, System Health, repeated-failure gate, backlog hygiene, foundation:verify, process:foundation-ship, and clean pushed main.
